mapper.select: SELECT CFG_VAL FROM GAME_CFG WHERE CFG_KEY = 'USER_TM_ID' LIMIT 1

SELECT G.HOME_TM_ID AS TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_SCORE > G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS W, SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_SCORE < G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L, SUM(CASE WHEN G.HOME_SCORE = G.AWAY_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS T, SUM(G.HOME_SCORE) AS RS, SUM(G.AWAY_SCORE) AS RA FROM GAME G JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = G.HOME_TM_ID WHERE G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND G.GAME_DT BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD = '03' GROUP BY G.HOME_TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM UNION ALL SELECT G.AWAY_TM_ID AS TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM, SUM(CASE WHEN G.AWAY_SCORE > G.HOME_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS W, SUM(CASE WHEN G.AWAY_SCORE < G.HOME_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS L, SUM(CASE WHEN G.AWAY_SCORE = G.HOME_SCORE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS T, SUM(G.AWAY_SCORE) AS RS, SUM(G.HOME_SCORE) AS RA FROM GAME G JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = G.AWAY_TM_ID WHERE G.SSNT_YR = #{ssntYr} AND G.GAME_DT BETWEEN #{weekStart} AND #{weekEnd} AND G.GAME_STTS_CD = '03' GROUP BY G.AWAY_TM_ID, T.TM_KR_NM

SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, C.REPR_POSN_CD, FC.FATG, FC.COND, (SELECT ABLT_VAL FROM PLR_ABLT PA WHERE PA.PLR_ID=P.PLR_ID AND PA.ABLT_CD='STM' LIMIT 1) AS STM FROM PLR_ENTY E JOIN PLR P ON P.PLR_ID = E.PLR_ID LEFT JOIN PLR_TM_CNTRCT C ON C.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID AND C.TM_ID = E.TM_ID LEFT JOIN PLR_FATG_COND FC ON FC.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID AND FC.SSNT_YR = (SELECT MAX(SSNT_YR) FROM SSNT) WHERE E.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND E.SSNT_YR = (SELECT MAX(SSNT_YR) FROM SSNT) AND P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'AT'
SELECT P.PLR_ID, P.PLR_NM, T.TM_KR_NM FROM PLR P LEFT JOIN PLR_TM PT ON PT.PLR_ID = P.PLR_ID LEFT JOIN TM T ON T.TM_ID = PT.TM_ID WHERE P.PLR_STTS_CD = 'INJ' LIMIT 50
SELECT DRFT_PLR_ID, TM_ID, ACCRCY FROM DRFT_SCUT_RPT WHERE ACCRCY < 100 LIMIT 200
SELECT F.FCLTY_LVL FROM TM_FCLTY F WHERE F.TM_ID = #{tmId} AND F.FCLTY_TYPE_CD = 'SCTG' LIMIT 1
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO SSNT_EVNT (SSNT_YR, EVNT_DT, TM_ID, PLR_ID, EVNT_TYPE_CD, EVNT_TTLT, EVNT_CNTS, RD_YN) VALUES
(#{e.ssntYr}, #{e.evntDt}, #{e.tmId}, #{e.plrId}, #{e.evntTypeCd}, #{e.evntTtlt}, #{e.evntCnts}, '0')
